About Paulson Garage Door LLC

12+ years serving Minneapolis and surrounding areas

Paulson Garage Door LLC started with a simple mission: to provide dependable garage door services to our neighbors in the Twin Cities. We're a locally owned and operated business, deeply rooted in the Minneapolis community, and committed to delivering honest and reliable work.

Our approach is straightforward: quality workmanship, clear communication, and fair pricing. We understand the importance of a functional and secure garage door, especially with our harsh Minnesota winters. We prioritize your satisfaction and safety above all else.

We're proud to be a part of the Minneapolis community and actively support local initiatives. We believe in giving back to the neighborhoods we serve, ensuring a stronger and more connected community for all.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Paulson Garage Door LLC

Trusted garage door installer professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
